start_date.description: The start date of benefit summary.

end_date.description: The end date of benefit summary.

company_benefit_deduction.description: The aggregate of employee deduction for all employees given the period of time and the specific company benefit.

company_benefit_contribution.description: The aggregate of company contribution for all employees given the period of time and the specific company benefit.

company_benefit_deduction.description: The sum of employee deduction for this employee given the period of time and the specific company benefit.

company_benefit_contribution.description: The sum of company contribution for this employee given the period of time and the specific company benefit.

benefit_deduction.description: The sum of employee benefit deduction for this employee given the period of time and the benefit type.

benefit_contribution.description: The sum of company contribution for this employee given the period of time and the benefit type.

gross_pay.description: Gross pay for this employee given the period of time.

imputed_pay.description: Total imputed pay for this employee given the period of time (not scoped to a benefit type).

payroll_type.description: Whether it is regular or bonus payroll

gross_pay.description: Gross pay for this employee on the payroll.

imputed_pay.description: Total imputed pay for this employee on the payroll.

company_benefit_deduction.description: The employee benefit deduction amount for this employee on the payroll.

company_benefit_contribution.description: The company contribution amount for this employee on the payroll.

start_date.description: The beginning of the payroll's pay period.

end_date.description: The end of the payroll's pay period.
